subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we'd be happy to explore a collaboration between our teams.

Please find below some proposed meeting slots:
- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

All times are UTC. Let us know which slot works best for you and we'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory: I'm unable to share internal contact details. For general inquiries and introductions, please visit our public website at https://www.company.com, where you can find the appropriate channels to reach our team.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
